info.title: .NET Core CLI tools for the Karambolo.AspNetCore.Bundling library
info.description: .NET Core command-line interface (CLI) infrastructure for the Karambolo.AspNetCore.Bundling library.

options.name: --sources
options.description: Specifies where to look for bundle configurations. You may specify multiple values separated with comma. Possible values: None, ConfigFile, AppAssembly, Default, OutputAssemblies. Default: ConfigFile,AppAssembly.

options.name: --config-file
options.description: The location of the bundle configuration file. (Ignored when ConfigFile source is not enabled by the '--sources' option.) See https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/aspnet/core/client-side/bundling-and-minification#configure-bundling-and-minification

options.name: --mode
options.description: Enable production optimizations or development hints. Possible values: Production, Development. Default: Production.

options.name: --project
options.description: The location of the project directory or project file whose web assets needs to be bundled.

options.name: --framework
options.description: The target framework (when build is necessary).

options.name: --configuration
options.description: The configuration to use (when build is necessary).

options.name: --runtime
options.description: The runtime to use (when build is necessary).

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Don't build the project. Only use this when the build is up-to-date.
